case_title: DOMINADOR PALUERO CASTRO VS. ADELINA CASTRO

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR DISSOLUTION FILED BY PETITIONER CASTRO, DOMINADOR PALUERO AS TO RESPONDENT CASTRO, ADELINA SUMMONS ISSUED AND FILED
INVALID/RETURNED CHECK FOR TRANSACTION B3503627F009 FOR FAMILY LAW PETITION/OTHER FIRST FILING

***NOTICE OF INVALID CHECK AND CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON NOTICE OF INVALID CHECK SENT TO DOMINADOR PALUERO CASTRO IN THE AMOUNT OF $224.50 REPRESENTING PETITION FOR DISSOLUTION ON JUN 27, 2003, TX # B3503627F009. FUTURE FILINGS OF DOMINADOR PALUERO CASTRO ON CASH BASIS ONLY UNTIL BAD CHECK IS REDEEMED.***
FAMILY LAW PETITION/OTHER FIRST FILING STRICKEN BY COURT ORDER FOR FAILURE TO REDEEM INVALID CHECK FOR TRANSACTION B3503627F009; NO FURTHER FILINGS ON PART OF CASTRO, DOMINADOR PALUERO

ORDER STRIKING FILING DUE TO INVALID CHECK AND CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF ORDER STRIKING FILING SENT BY ACCOUNTING ON 8/13/03 TO PLAINTIFF DOMINADOR PALUERO CASTRO. COPIES OF SAID ORDER WERE ALSO SENT TO ALL PARTIES OF THE ACTION
